sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Continuous Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player character is continuously flying rather than jumping. Movement is free in 2D space during gameplay. Not a traditional platformer mechanic.

special_mechanics.name: 8-way/16-way Directional Aiming
special_mechanics.description: Character can move in 8 directions (joystick) while independently aiming in 16 directions (rotatable button). Decouples movement from aim direction.

special_mechanics.name: Satellite Module Orbit
special_mechanics.description: Satellite orbits player character and provides backup firepower. Can be rotated independently. Relative position can be adjusted around player.

special_mechanics.name: Megacrush Attack
special_mechanics.description: Rapid button presses cause megacrush attack that destroys all on-screen enemies at expense of vitality gauge portion.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented for SNES port. Game is a shooting game, not platformer, so traditional jump/gravity mechanics do not apply. Gameplay focuses on continuous 2D flight and rotatable aiming mechanics rather than physics-driven movement.
